# Tiram

> Tiram is GST-ready billing and inventory software for Indian businesses — single-counter shops, distributors, and multi-branch chains — and is configurable for global tax regimes (VAT, sales tax) for branches outside India. GST invoicing, multi-warehouse stock, UPI payments, and English + Tamil UI.

Tiram helps Indian businesses raise GST-compliant invoices with GSTIN validation, HSN/SAC at line level, and automatic CGST/SGST/IGST by place of supply; track stock across warehouses with one-tap branch transfers and low-stock alerts; collect dues over UPI with business UPI ID, mark-paid, and follow-up flows; and run daily sales, GST, cash, inventory, profit, audit, and GSTR-1 / GSTR-3B reports. The app is in English and Tamil today (with Tamil-friendly thermal raster receipts where the printer setup supports it) and more Indian locales are rolling out. Tiram supports browser printing and ESC/POS thermal receipt setup, scopes each business through organization membership and role-based access (counter / accountant / owner), and is available as a cloud web app and as an offline desktop app for Windows and Mac for counters with power cuts or unreliable internet. The configurable tax engine also supports VAT (EU/GCC) and sales tax (US) for businesses with global branches; the mobile app is under development.

## Pages

- [Home (English)](https://tiram.app/en): Product overview, features, pricing, FAQ.
- [Home (Tamil)](https://tiram.app/ta): முகப்பு பக்கம் — அம்சங்கள், விலை, கேள்விகள்.
- [Sign up](https://app.tiram.co.in/en/onboarding): Create a Tiram account in the product app.
- [Sign in](https://app.tiram.co.in/en/sign-in): Sign in to an existing account in the product app.

## Articles

- [GSTR-1 vs GSTR-3B: difference, reconciliation, and how to draft a clean GSTR-1](https://tiram.app/en/articles/gstr-1-vs-gstr-3b-difference): What each return is for, how they reconcile, the four classic mismatch causes (missing place-of-supply, UoM mismatches, malformed GSTINs, late credit notes), and how Tiram's pre-export validation catches each before upload to the GSTN portal. Tamil: [https://tiram.app/ta/articles/gstr-1-vs-gstr-3b-difference](https://tiram.app/ta/articles/gstr-1-vs-gstr-3b-difference).
- [The daily business cockpit: 13 detectors that tell Indian shop owners what to fix first](https://tiram.app/en/articles/business-health-dashboard-indian-smb): A prioritised, snoozeable issue feed with 13 deterministic detectors across receivables, inventory, margin, expenses, and GST due dates — five severity tiers, a four-card cap, per-user snooze. Rule-based, not AI. Tamil: [https://tiram.app/ta/articles/business-health-dashboard-indian-smb](https://tiram.app/ta/articles/business-health-dashboard-indian-smb).

## Who Tiram is for

- Hardware stores, electrical shops, and provision stores at the counter — GST invoicing, thermal receipts, customer pending (पाक्की / பாக்கி).
- FMCG and pharma distributors — multi-warehouse stock, one-tap branch transfers, route-level dispatch and ageing receivables.
- Multi-branch retail chains in Bengaluru, Chennai, Mumbai, Coimbatore, Hyderabad, Pune, Delhi, Madurai, and across Tamil Nadu — multi-org consolidation, role-based staff, branch P&L.
- Tamil-speaking counters and family businesses — Tamil UI and Tamil-friendly thermal receipts.
- Indian SMBs migrating off Tally, Vyapar, or KhataBook — CSV / spreadsheet bulk-import for products and customers.

## Capabilities

- GST-compliant invoicing with GSTIN validation, HSN/SAC at line level, place-of-supply CGST/SGST/IGST, and GSTR-1 / GSTR-3B period exports your CA can hand in.
- Multi-warehouse inventory tracking with one-tap stock transfers, reorder levels, and low-stock alerts.
- Payment recording in any mode: UPI (with business UPI ID, mark-paid, follow-ups), cash, card, bank transfer, credit, and other regional methods.
- Daily and period reports covering sales, GST, cash, inventory, profit, receivables, payables, audit activity, top products, and defaulters.
- Multi-organization support: run multiple businesses with isolated data and role-based staff access (counter, accountant, admin).
- Full English and Tamil UI today, with more locales rolling out. Non-Latin script rendering proven for Tamil on thermal receipts where supported.
- Browser printing for invoices and ESC/POS thermal receipt setup.
- Cloud subscription and offline desktop app for Windows and Mac, activated through the Tiram team.
- Mobile app under development.

## India-specific depth

- GSTIN validation at customer creation, HSN/SAC at line level, automatic CGST/SGST/IGST calculation by place of supply, FY-aware GSTR-1 / GSTR-3B period reports your CA can use.
- E-invoicing-ready data model (GSTIN, HSN/SAC, place of supply, line-level tax); direct IRP submission and IRN return on the active roadmap.
- UPI as a first-class payment mode — save the business UPI ID, mark invoices paid in one tap, and send follow-ups for pending.
- Tamil-friendly thermal receipt raster rendering where the printer setup supports it; Hindi and other Indian scripts coming next.
- Offline desktop apps for Windows and Mac, built for power-cut-prone counters and patchy-internet godowns.
- Bulk import from Tally, Vyapar, KhataBook, QuickBooks, Zoho Books, and other spreadsheet exporters for fast migration.

## Why businesses choose Tiram

1. **One tool, end-to-end.** GST invoicing, inventory, pending dues, GSTR-ready reports, and staff in one place — not a ledger app plus a billing app plus a spreadsheet.
2. **Grows from one counter to many branches.** Multi-organization, multi-branch, multi-warehouse, and role-based staff are built in from day one. No painful migration when you scale.
3. **Live in minutes, not months.** Sensible defaults for GST, UPI, and thermal receipts. No consultant rollout, no implementation phase.
4. **Decisions, not just data entry.** Ageing dues, low-stock alerts, slow-moving items, branch-wise profit, and GST exposure are surfaced where owners can act.
5. **Cash health, not just invoices.** Receivables tracking, payment allocation, defaulter views, and UPI-based follow-ups are baked in — faster collections, less working capital locked up.

Tiram is a modern alternative to legacy or single-purpose tools (Tally, Vyapar, KhataBook, Odoo) for Indian and global SMBs.

## Pricing

Standard starts at ₹249 per user per month, exclusive of GST. Annual billing waives 2 months, so yearly billing charges 10 months. A 30-day free trial is available without a credit card. Pricing is displayed in INR; other display currencies are available on request for global branches. Multi-currency invoicing is on the roadmap.
